info.name: BabaTillu DSR API
info.description:
Complete API collection for BabaTillu DSR platform. Covers Auth, MFA, Users, Audit, Notifications, Billing, Tenants, Membership, AI Reports, Report Templates, Schedules, and Runs.

**Setup:**
1. Set `base_url` variable to your API host (default: http://localhost:5000)
2. Call `POST /auth/login` — the `access_token` and `tenant_id` vars will auto-populate via the test script.
3. All authenticated requests use `Authorization: Bearer {{access_token}}`.

request.description: Used after login when MFA is required. challengeId is returned from the login response.
Must send raw JSON body. The stripe-signature header is required for HMAC verification.

body.raw:
{
  "title": "Implement OAuth flow",
  "description": "Add OAuth login support",
  "status": "open",
  "priority": "high",
  "assigneeId": "{{user_id}}",
  "departmentId": "{{department_id}}",
  "projectId": null,
  "dueAt": "2026-03-10T00:00:00.000Z",
  "metadata": {"vip": true}
}

item.name: AI Reports (Deprecated)
item.description: AI-powered report generation. All endpoints require authentication.

item.name: Report Schedules
item.description: Requires authentication + reports.schedule / reports.view / reports.delete permission.

body.raw:
{
